        {
            var __r0 = TryMap(__0);
            return __r0.IsSuccess
                ? global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::AnimalDto, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Success(__r0.Value)

        }
        if (src is global::Dog __1)
        {
            var __r1 = TryMap(__1);
            return __r1.IsSuccess
                ? global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::AnimalDto, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Success(__r1.Value)
                : global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::AnimalDto, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Failure(__r1.Error);
        }
        return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::AnimalDto, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Failure(new global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError("mapping.polymorphic.unhandled_type", "(root)", "runtime type " + src.GetType().FullName + " has no declared [TryMap]"));
    }
